confidence.label: high
confidence.rationale: Minimum corrigibility: both legal instruments directly eliminate the institutional preconditions for symbolic-order self-correction — unconditional personal oath forecloses military dissent; single-party law forecloses political competition. Score of 1 (not 0) preserves the possibility that informal networks and internal party factionalism provided marginal corrigibility channels, but the constitutional-legal architecture is unambiguous.
